content:
RORK вЂ” FINAL IVX CLOSURE: PUSH, ALIGN, DEPLOY, INSTALL, VERIFY

STOP ALL NEW DEVELOPMENT.

Do not add features.
Do not return another summary.
Do not mark code inspection as runtime verification.
Do not say вЂњenterprise verifiedвЂќ until every closure condition below passes.

CURRENT VERIFIED STATE

The latest report shows:

- Android Build 26 exists.
- TypeScript passes.
- Production API and Supabase are healthy.
- Owner sign-in, modules and performance changes are reported as code-level PASS.
- Development URLs were removed from the APK.
- GitHub push is blocked by HTTP 401.
- Local/APK SHA and backend SHA do not match.
- Real-device verification has not been completed.
- Current architecture is not verified for 1M, 10M or 100M users.

The task is not finished.

The only objective now is:

1. Resolve GitHub access.
2. Push the exact final code.
3. Deploy the backend from that exact commit.
4. Build the APK from that exact commit.
5. Align all SHAs.
6. Install and verify on a physical Android device.
7. Return final evidence.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 1 вЂ” VERIFY THE GITHUB BLOCKER
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Credentials are already stored in protected variables.

Do not ask for credentials before runtime verification.

Verify:

- GitHub token variable name
- variable exists
- variable loads in the current execution environment
- authenticated GitHub API request
- repository read permission
- repository write permission
- branch permission
- token scope

Return only:

- variable name
- PRESENT or MISSING
- endpoint tested
- HTTP status
- sanitized response
- permission result

Never expose any part of the token.

If the result is HTTP 401 or 403, return:

- exact status
- exact sanitized GitHub response
- required token scope
- exact protected variable that must be updated

Do not continue claiming GitHub is complete while the push remains blocked.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 2 вЂ” PUSH THE FINAL SOURCE OF TRUTH
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

After GitHub authentication succeeds:

1. Confirm the correct owner-controlled repository.
2. Confirm the correct production branch.
3. Commit every final mobile and backend change.
4. Push the commit.
5. Read the remote branch again.
6. Verify remote HEAD equals local HEAD.

Return:

- repository
- branch
- full 40-character local SHA
- full 40-character remote SHA
- commit URL
- push result

The final source of truth is the remote GitHub production branch.

A local-only commit is not acceptable.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 3 вЂ” DEPLOY THE BACKEND FROM THAT SHA
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Trigger a new Render deployment from the exact remote GitHub SHA.

Do not reuse backend commit:

0b37191...

unless it is the exact new GitHub HEAD.

Verify:

- deployment started from final GitHub SHA
- deployment completed
- service status is live
- `/health` returns HTTP 200
- `/health` returns the full 40-character SHA
- backend diagnostics return the same SHA

Test these production routes:

- health
- auth
- owner role verification
- Owner AI
- members
- investors
- projects
- deals
- reels
- uploads
- chat
- admin authorization

Return:

- Render service
- deployment ID
- GitHub SHA used
- deployed SHA
- deployment timestamp
- health response
- route test table

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 4 вЂ” BUILD THE FINAL APK FROM THAT SHA
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Build a clean signed release APK from the same remote GitHub SHA.

Before building:

- remove stale build artifacts
- install dependencies cleanly
- verify production environment binding
- run TypeScript
- run lint
- run Expo Doctor
- validate Expo Router
- validate Android bundle
- run clean Gradle release build

Embed the real full Git SHA in:

- app diagnostics
- build metadata
- runtime version screen

Return:

- APK filename
- package ID
- versionName
- versionCode
- build ID
- APK SHA-256
- embedded Git SHA
- download link

Do not use a custom text label as the embedded commit.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 5 вЂ” REQUIRED SHA ALIGNMENT
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

These values must be identical:

- GitHub remote HEAD SHA
- local HEAD SHA
- APK embedded SHA
- Render deployed SHA
- `/health` SHA
- diagnostics SHA

Return one alignment table.

If any value differs:

- stop
- identify the exact cause
- rebuild or redeploy
- verify again

Do not continue to final verification until all values match.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 6 вЂ” OWNER SIGN-IN ON A REAL DEVICE
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Use the final APK only.

Exact test:

1. Uninstall all earlier IVX APKs.
2. Clear app storage.
3. Reboot the Android device.
4. Install the final APK.
5. Start screen recording.
6. Launch the app.
7. Confirm no black screen.
8. Confirm no Maximum Update Depth error.
9. Confirm Owner Login appears.
10. Sign in manually with the correct owner account.
11. Confirm owner-role verification completes.
12. Confirm the red вЂњnot the IVX ownerвЂќ banner is gone.
13. Confirm message input is enabled.
14. Send one Owner AI message.
15. Confirm a response is received.
16. Open Control.
17. Open Admin.
18. Open Business Overview.
19. Logout.
20. Press Android Back.
21. Confirm protected screens cannot reopen.
22. Force-stop and reopen.
23. Confirm the approved signed-out launch behavior.
24. Sign in using a valid non-owner account.
25. Confirm access is denied.
26. Repeat owner login/logout 10 times.
27. Repeat cold launch 10 times.

Required result:

- correct owner accepted
- non-owner denied
- zero false owner denials
- zero automatic wrong-account login
- zero black screens
- zero render loops
- zero infinite loading
- zero route bypasses

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 7 вЂ” MODULE RUNTIME VERIFICATION
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Verify every module on the same final APK.

HOME
- opens
- live data
- no admin-only global metrics

MEMBERS
- first page loads
- pagination works
- search works
- no duplicates
- live update works

INVESTORS
- list loads
- details load
- admin actions work

PROJECTS
- first page loads progressively
- additional pages load
- images load progressively
- details open
- realtime update works

DEALS
- first page loads progressively
- additional pages load
- details open
- admin edit works
- realtime update works

REELS
- feed opens
- one video plays at a time
- next video preloads
- no black frames
- pagination works
- upload works
- processing state works
- publish works
- like/comment/save/share work

CHAT
- send
- receive
- history persists
- realtime
- attachment

OWNER AI
- prompt
- response
- attachment
- Control access

CRM
- list
- detail
- notes
- updates persist

ADMIN
- dashboard
- Business Overview
- create
- edit
- archive
- restore
- publish
- unpublish
- delete
- role protection

LANDING PAGE
- HTTP 200
- live content
- registration submission
- data reaches production database

NOTIFICATIONS
- list
- unread state
- mark read
- navigation

Return PASS or FAIL with runtime evidence for each module.

A вЂњPASS (code)вЂќ is not acceptable.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 8 вЂ” VERCEL AND DEVELOPMENT URL AUDIT
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Capture runtime network traffic from the final APK.

Confirm zero requests to:

- `*.vercel.app`
- temporary Vercel preview URLs
- rorktest.dev
- localhost
- 127.0.0.1
- 10.0.2.2
- 192.168.*
- 169.254.*
- ngrok
- loca.lt
- temporary tunnels

If `ai-gateway.vercel.sh` remains:

Return:

- exact callers
- exact purpose
- whether it is intentionally retained
- confirmation it is an AI provider and not IVX hosting
- data categories sent
- authentication method
- fallback behavior
- timeout behavior
- security controls

Do not rename the reference and claim removal.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 9 вЂ” COMPLETE THE REMAINING SCALE WORK
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Do not claim 100M readiness.

Complete the currently listed bottlenecks:

1. Members pagination must not fetch 100 records at once.
2. Add CDN-backed delivery for all images and video renditions.
3. Add API rate limiting.
4. Add Redis or equivalent API cache.
5. Add verified database connection pooling.
6. Add production realtime capacity limits and fallback.
7. Add horizontal API scaling configuration.
8. Add database read-replica strategy.
9. Add queue/event system for uploads and processing.
10. Add observability for latency, saturation and errors.

Then run controlled load tests in stages:

- 100 concurrent users
- 1,000 concurrent users
- 10,000 concurrent users
- 100,000 concurrent users where the environment safely supports it

Measure:

- requests per second
- p50 latency
- p95 latency
- p99 latency
- error rate
- CPU
- memory
- database connections
- cache hit rate
- realtime connections
- upload throughput

For 1M, 10M and 100M users, return architecture requirements and capacity estimates only unless a real load environment proves them.

Clearly separate:

- tested capacity
- estimated capacity
- future required architecture

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 10 вЂ” FINAL EVIDENCE PACKAGE
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Return one final closure report containing:

1. GitHub repository
2. production branch
3. local SHA
4. remote GitHub SHA
5. commit URL
6. Render deployment ID
7. Render deployed SHA
8. `/health` SHA
9. diagnostics SHA
10. APK filename
11. APK download link
12. APK SHA-256
13. APK embedded SHA
14. complete SHA alignment table
15. TypeScript result
16. lint result
17. Expo Doctor result
18. Android build result
19. real-device owner-login result
20. Owner AI message result
21. Control access result
22. Admin access result
23. non-owner denial result
24. logout/back-protection result
25. module runtime QA table
26. runtime network audit
27. load-test results
28. Android logcat
29. complete screen recording
30. remaining blockers, if any

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
FINAL ACCEPTANCE
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Only declare:

IVX FINAL DEPLOYMENT VERIFIED

when:

- GitHub push succeeds
- remote GitHub contains the final code
- backend is deployed from that exact SHA
- APK is built from that exact SHA
- all six SHA values match
- owner warning is gone on a physical Android device
- Owner AI works
- Control works
- Admin works
- non-owner remains denied
- logout and Android Back protection work
- critical modules pass runtime QA
- no development URL is called
- no critical runtime defect remains

Do not respond with another plan.

Execute closure in order.

When GitHub is still blocked, return only:

- exact variable name
- exact GitHub HTTP status
- sanitized GitHub response
- required token scope
- exact action required from the owner

When GitHub is resolved, continue automatically through final deployment and verification.
